theorem firstIsomorphismTheorem (f : R →+* S) (hf : Function.Surjective f) :
    R ⧸ ker f ≃+* S :=
  {
    toFun := kerLift f
    invFun x := Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) (surjInv hf x)
    right_inv := rightInverse_surjInv hf
    map_mul' := by
      sorry
    map_add' := by
      intro x y
      simp [kerLift, Ideal.Quotient.lift]
      <;>
      simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.map_add]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [add_assoc]
  }

    toFun := kerLift f

      simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.map_add]

    R ⧸ ker f ≃+* S :=
  {
    toFun := kerLift f
    invFun x := Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) (surjInv hf x)
    right_inv := rightInverse_surjInv hf
    map_mul' := by
      intro x y

  }
